description.value: Cost: Free Effect: Pass an item to an adjacent willing creature. Both creatures must have at least one free hand. Recipient must be within 5 feet. Both parties must be willing. Doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks

system.effect: Pass an item to an adjacent willing creature. Both creatures must have at least one free hand. Recipient must be within 5 feet. Both parties must be willing. Doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks
